regulation_name: FDA Rules on Labeling and Fair Information Practices
citation: FDA Administrative Order No. 2014-0030 — Rules on Labeling of Prepackaged Food and related consumer information requirements
summary: Mandatory consumer warnings and material product information for PH market must be understandable to Filipino consumers, including Tagalog or Filipino where required.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: English-only mandatory warnings, usage instructions, or safety information in PH-targeted ads. ACTION: WARN — require Tagalog/Filipino localisation for mandatory consumer elements. CHECK: Allergen warnings, usage limits, and safety cautions. ESCALATE IF: Health or safety warnings missing in local language.
